name: Seras
lore: Hybrid of fairy and human, wielding lightning. A villain who fights as a Powerful Opponent.

skills.description: Does ATK-scaled damage to one enemy and applies Shock for 4 turns. Shock deals DoT equal to 30% of the damage dealt; each application stacks independently and can be cleansed.
Does Weakpoint ATK-scaled damage to all enemies. Weakpoint deals 3x damage against debuffed enemies.

ultimate.description: CRITICAL: does 500% ATK damage to one enemy. Critical ignores 50% of the target's defense, ignores type advantage/disadvantage, and increases damage by 50%.

passive.name: Charged
passive.description: Gains a Charged stack every time Seras receives or evades an attack (max 5). Each stack raises ATK, DEF and evade chance by 5%. Teammates tagged [Powerful Opponent] gain +10% to all stats in battle.
